acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] All match arms updated to ctx/payload.
- [ ] RequestContext extraction tests updated and green.
description:
**Problem**
Daemon request routing (`coord.rs`, `server.rs`) matches on the old Request shape. After refactor, it must destructure `{ ctx, payload }` and pass repo/meta/read correctly.

**Design**
- Update `daemon/coord.rs` `handle_request` match arms to `{ ctx, payload }` and pass:
  - `ctx.repo.path` for repo
  - `ctx.meta` or `ctx.read` for meta/read
  - payload struct directly to mutation/query handlers
- Update `daemon/server.rs` RequestContext extraction, read gate request building, and any request‑type detection to use ctx/payload.
- Keep RequestContext fields identical (repo, namespace, actor_id, client_request_id, read_consistency tags).
- Update `daemon/server.rs` tests that construct Request variants.

**Acceptance**
- [ ] All daemon request routing compiles with ctx/payload Request.
- [ ] RequestContext tests still validate the same extracted fields.
- [ ] `cargo test -p beads-rs daemon::server` passes.

**Files:**
- crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/coord.rs
- crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/server.rs
design: Follow Phase 4 in REFACTORING_PLAN.md. Focus on mechanical destructuring and keep behavior stable.
title: Daemon routing: update coord/server to ctx+payload

description: Store bootstrap currently persists metadata and initializes WAL index through separate durable operations. Introduce a single bootstrap state transition type so partial initialization cannot leave divergent durable truth across metadata and index stores.
title: P0: Make store bootstrap meta+index initialization one atomic durable state
